name: node-escodegen
title: node-escodegen
description:
ECMAScript code generator
This is an ECMAScript (also popularly known as JavaScript) code generator
from Mozilla's Parser API AST.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use escodegen because ECMAScript code generator.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use escodegen as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `escodegen [options] file...` as documented upstream for escodegen.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair escodegen with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `escodegen --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install node-escodegen. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `escodegen [options] file...`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ECMAScript code generator.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: ECMAScript code generator.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install node-escodegen
Install with: sudo apt install node-escodegen
